very cute florist
also quite funny to see that word
Don't forget the real kicker was double letter r
Like sure, vowel-less on its own is fine
But why od you gotta repeat a letter too
Felt like they did that solely to spite players

well, its a word
it would have come, sooner or later

Aye, I dont judge
No rules police out to get you for that
Guys i cant find my old data

Also in the waiting room for Arachne
Luv me spooder women
I'm a very sane individual, trust me
I wont judge if you got a little freak inside your mind
We all are freaks against nature afterall

My obsessions are...
Eh, prob better to call em hyperfixations

Brightest stars, shortest fuse
Topics jumping every week with only pieces staying in the mosaic that is myself

Some parts do grow to proper obbession status
Like Morimens, for one.

I'm not alone, I am the fire that burns
Not of the city but out of the 'burbs
A river that's just dying of thirst
I am a reverend lying in church
A crack in the pattern, a miracle waiting to happen
A promise that never was kept
One of those moments you'll never forget
I am that feeling inside
The one we all know but can't really describe
I am the blood spill, but I'm in love still
Somewhere in Stockholm
But I'm not alone
Don't have to get by on my own
I'm finally home
Hemma i Stockholm
Där jag hör hemma

That's me right there on the corner
Listening to Wu in my Walkman
Neon lights hit the water

That's me right there on the corner
I, one day, would be leaving
